overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk bar (Lizzie's Bar from Cyberpunk 2077), beginning in an elevator lobby, riding an elevator with holographic displays, and exploring the neon-lit interior with teal and red lighting. The footage showcases high-fidelity game engine graphics with detailed character models and atmospheric lighting.

events.description: approaching and entering the elevator from the lobby

agents.ego_description: walking from the lobby into the elevator

polished dark wooden flooring with white geometric line markings
white and dark wall panels with metallic vertical trim

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a modern elevator lobby with polished wooden floors and minimalist wall panels. The camera walks forward toward a large metallic elevator with teal accent lighting, entering the elevator car at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic elevator interior with holographic displays

events.description: holographic displays activate showing black and white historical war footage

agents.ego_description: standing in the elevator observing the holographic displays on the walls as the elevator moves

entered.detail: large holographic screen with yellow border displaying monochrome historical footage of war scenes
illuminated metallic control panel with upward arrows and floor indicator lights
long cyan fluorescent light fixture running the length of the elevator ceiling

segments.scene_description: Inside the enclosed elevator, the camera pans around to view holographic displays showing black and white war footage on the walls. The space is illuminated by cyan ceiling lights, and the elevator control panel glows with teal indicators as the car ascends or descends.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor between elevator and main bar lounge

ambient lighting shifts from bright cyan elevator to darker bar atmosphere

agents.ego_description: exiting the elevator and stepping into the bar area

notable_agents.action: male patron in leather jacket and red pants walking toward the elevator

entered.detail: dark corridor leading into the bar with teal accent lighting and patterned carpet
black leather seating booths visible in the background
flatscreen displays showing colorful abstract visuals

segments.scene_description: The elevator doors open to reveal a dark cyberpunk bar interior. As the camera exits, lighting shifts from cyan to darker ambient tones. A male patron in a leather jacket walks past toward the elevator, and the bar's lounge seating becomes visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: main bar lounge with neon signage and seating areas

events.description: turning to survey the bar interior and neon signage
approaching the bar counter with illuminated base

agents.ego_description: walking through the bar, observing the neon-lit interior, seating areas, and other patrons

notable_agents.action: patron standing near the wall looking at a screen
seated patron relaxing on leather couch

entered.detail: vertical neon sign spelling LIZZIE'S in bright cyan letters mounted on the wall
long curved bar counter with illuminated base and bottles arranged behind
black leather couches and chairs arranged in intimate seating areas
long horizontal cyan neon light tubes suspended from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera explores the main bar area, revealing the iconic LIZZIE'S neon sign in cyan, leather seating areas, and a long bar counter with glowing base. Patrons are scattered throughout—some standing, some seated—while wall-mounted screens display colorful abstract visuals and cyan neon fixtures illuminate the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: back corridor with red neon lighting and private rooms

events.description: lighting shifts from cyan to red neon as entering the back corridor
passing by a couple embracing against the corridor wall

agents.ego_description: walking down the back corridor past red-lit private rooms toward the rear elevator

notable_agents.action: couple embracing and kissing against the corridor wall

entered.detail: vertical red neon light strips outlining doorways and wall edges
glass doorway with red interior lighting and frosted glass panels
second elevator bank with metallic doors and red accent lighting

segments.scene_description: Moving into the back corridor, the lighting shifts dramatically from cyan to red neon. The camera passes private rooms with red-lit glass doorways and a couple embracing against the wall. The corridor leads toward a rear elevator bank, maintaining the cyberpunk aesthetic with dark walls and vibrant red accent lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a minimalist modern lobby into the neon-drenched depths of a cyberpunk bar. It begins by moving across polished wooden floors toward a metallic elevator, entering the car where the environment shifts to a confined space filled with cyan ceiling lights and holographic war footage. As the doors slide open, the camera exits into a dark lounge where the lighting transitions to ambient tones, passing a leather-clad patron to reveal the expansive main bar area dominated by a glowing cyan LIZZIE'S sign and abstract wall screens. The scene then pushes further into the venue, moving past leather seating and a glowing bar counter before turning into a back corridor. Finally, the atmosphere shifts dramatically from cyan to vibrant red neon as the camera passes red-lit glass doorways and embracing figures toward a rear elevator bank.
